title: 1 step DFU - User can trigger firmware update for just earbuds
scenario: 1-step DFU: User can trigger firmware update for just the earbuds (not the charging case) when both have updates available
steps: Start app with Osprey earbuds and charging case both on at least version 5039 with updates available.
Navigate to Settings/Update and click update button.
Click Update for earbuds/Voyager Free 60+ UC.
expected: Only earbuds DFU completes successfully; charging case stays on the lower version.
